headline: US Doubles Hormuz Shipping Insurance to $40 Billion Amid Energy Disruption

headline: 3 Overrated  Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
summary: Each stock in this article is trading near its 52-week high. These elevated prices usually indicate some degree of investor confidence, business improvements, or favorable market conditions.

headline: AI data center boom ‘stress tests’ insurers as private capital floods in
